title: webhook — notification classes + categories
description: 3 Notification classes + 3 categories registered with the notifications core. Fired on subscription lifecycle events + probe failures. All transactional — admins can't opt out.

categories.description: Notifies tenant admins when a webhook subscription auto-disables (410 Gone, consecutive failure threshold, api version sunset, tenant suspension). Includes reason + last delivery detail + re-enable link.
Notifies tenant admins when a pinned subscription auto-upgrades due to api version sunset. Includes from/to version + payload change summary + migration guide URL.
Notifies tenant admins when a subscription fails N consecutive probes. Warning-level — subscription not yet auto-disabled but integration health degraded.
